problem.title: MULLS cluster discovery on KITTI Odom seq 07 full (1102 frames)
problem.question: Which MULLS profile family is strongest on KITTI Odom seq 07 full?

variants.label: KITTI default
variants.intent: A-LOAM-style features + multi-metric scan-to-map (line/plane/point) baseline for HDL-64E.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Coarser voxels, lighter Ceres, shorter submap window, sparser point metric.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Finer map voxels, more knn, deeper Ceres, longer history.
